creator: jobs.nihilator@yahoo.com
text:
<<< 550 pbi-manager.tbz: No such file or directory.
	     Error: Unable to get ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-8.2-release/Latest/pbi-manager.tbz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
	     pkg_add: unable to fetch 'ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-8.2-release/Latest/pbi-manager.tbz' by URL
	     pkg_add: 1 package addition(s) failed

Fix: 

pkg_add -v -r ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages/Latest/pbi-manager.tbz
